verificationNotes: Confirmed release 2025-04-14 and $0.40/$1.60 per 1M token pricing via OpenAI docs and independent coverage. All 5 benchmark rows (MMLU 87.5, GPQA 65, SWE-bench 23.6, AIME 49.6, IFEval 84.1) confirmed verbatim on the cited docsbot.ai page. No changes made.
